docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ROBINSON, YEMISI
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,050.00 FILED BY FRANKLIN, YOLANDA AS TO DEFENDANT ROBINSON, YEMISI ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-20-1997 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT C
